series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all fingerprint cards that have been on file with the dealer licensing section and electronic fingerprint records that have been transmitted to the dealer system from BCI & I.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain fingerprint cards for one (1) year from the date the fingerprints were taken. ; Electronic: Retain fingerprint cards for one (1) year from the date the fingerprints were taken., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
